title: Product CRUD with variants
description: Full product management with variants, pricing in cents, slug generation, featured flag, ISR revalidation

inScope: Product list view with filters (category, brand, status)
Price input in dollars, storage in cents

acceptanceCriteria.text: Admin can create product with name, slug, description, price, category, brand, images
Admin can add variants with name, options, and optional price override
Images upload to Vercel Blob and display in product gallery
Price stored as cents, displayed as dollars in UI
